## nsc auth trust-relationships remove

Remove a trust relationship.

### Synopsis

Remove a trust relationship by specifying its ID.

```
nsc auth trust-relationships remove [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help        help for remove
      --id string   ID of the trust relationship to remove (required).
```
